title: ファインモーション登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion—a descendant of royalty with a
commitment to serve Ireland. As her trainer, I
hope to let her channel her love of running into a
racing career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she only has three years to compete, after
which she has no choice but to return to Ireland
and fulfill the lofty duties of her house...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite that, she's determined to enjoy this time
to the fullest. As her trainer, I've promised to help
her make the most of her limited time and help
make her dreams come true!
